name: Toubujyuhan Co.,Ltd.
summary: Toubujyuhan Co., Ltd. engages in the real estate business in Japan. The company is involved in the real estate trading, leasing, selling, and management businesses, as well as used homes and condominiums remodeling activities. It also sells and rents long-term care and welfare-related products; and undertakes long-term care remodeling work, as well as offers real estate insurance services. The company was founded in 1984 and is headquartered in Shimonoseki, Japan.
